alt.zh-TW: News Web Crawler 分析平台導覽錄影。
alt.en: Guided walkthrough recording of the News Web Crawler analytics platform.

caption.zh-TW: 展示新聞資料匯入、pipeline jobs、資料品質、EDA、文字探勘、文章搜尋、ML diagnostics 與報表輸出。
caption.en: Shows news ingestion, pipeline jobs, data quality, EDA, text mining, article search, ML diagnostics, and report export.

alt.zh-TW: News Web Crawler dashboard，顯示 pipeline 狀態與整體分析摘要。
alt.en: News Web Crawler dashboard showing pipeline state and analytics summary.

caption.zh-TW: 首頁把資料量、品質狀態、pipeline progress 與分析入口集中在同一個工作台。
caption.en: The home dashboard combines volume, quality state, pipeline progress, and analytics entry points.

alt.zh-TW: News Web Crawler 的資料處理旅程頁面。
alt.en: The data processing journey page in News Web Crawler.

caption.zh-TW: 以 guided assistant 串起上傳、demo pipeline、job 狀態與後續分析流程。
caption.en: Guided assistant connects upload, demo pipeline, job state, and downstream analysis steps.

alt.zh-TW: News Web Crawler 的文字探勘分析頁面。
alt.en: The text mining analytics page in News Web Crawler.

caption.zh-TW: 整合 TF-IDF、n-gram、topic modeling、cluster、entity 與 co-occurrence network。
caption.en: Combines TF-IDF, n-grams, topic modeling, clustering, entities, and co-occurrence networks.

alt.zh-TW: News Web Crawler 的新聞分析儀表板。
alt.en: The news analytics dashboard in News Web Crawler.

caption.zh-TW: 顯示趨勢、來源、類別、關鍵詞與 business insight 卡片。
caption.en: Shows trends, sources, categories, keywords, and business insight cards.

alt.zh-TW: 資料品質頁面顯示驗證結果、錯誤類型與可匯出 issue 清單。
alt.en: Data quality page showing validation results, issue types, and exportable issue lists.

caption.zh-TW: 用可追蹤 issue list 呈現缺漏日期、invalid URL、短內容與重複資料等問題。
caption.en: Tracks missing dates, invalid URLs, short content, and duplicate records through an issue list.

alt.zh-TW: ML diagnostics 頁面顯示模型指標、決策樹與可解釋分析。
alt.en: ML diagnostics page showing model metrics, decision tree, and explainability views.

caption.zh-TW: 支援 baseline training、模型比較、decision tree image 與 article-level explanation。
caption.en: Supports baseline training, model comparison, decision tree imagery, and article-level explanation.

alt.zh-TW: 報表庫頁面顯示可輸出的 ML diagnostics reports。
alt.en: Report library showing exportable ML diagnostics reports.

caption.zh-TW: 報表可輸出 HTML、PDF、XLSX、JSON 與 manifest，適合保留 demo evidence。
caption.en: Reports export HTML, PDF, XLSX, JSON, and manifests for demo evidence.

alt.zh-TW: 文章搜尋頁面顯示 facet、排序與新聞內容瀏覽。
alt.en: Article search page showing facets, sorting, and news content browsing.

caption.zh-TW: 可用來源、類別、topic、cluster、entity 與 ranking 過濾新聞資料。
caption.en: Filters news data by source, category, topic, cluster, entity, and ranking mode.

alt.zh-TW: Pipeline Jobs 頁面顯示 job type、參數與執行記錄。
alt.en: Pipeline Jobs page showing job type, parameters, and execution logs.

caption.zh-TW: 從 UI 執行 demo、crawl、analysis、ML training 與 diagnostics report export。
caption.en: Runs demo, crawl, analysis, ML training, and diagnostics report export from the UI.

metadata.projectType: 全端新聞資料智慧平台
capabilities: CKIP 中文斷詞/詞性標註/命名實體辨識
關鍵詞搭配與情感分析
時間序列趨勢與突發偵測
可解釋 ML 模型訓練與診斷
